outputs.title: Data management and consolidation

outputs.title: Central sustainable e-mobility policy and regulatory framework

results.title: Recommendations & Lessons Learned
results.outcome: Strategic recommendations from implementation experience are systematically captured, actioned, and tracked to improve NREP Strategic Plan delivery.

outputs.title: Policy and Regulatory Recommendations

targets.description: Review and strengthen the renewable energy licensing framework to reduce bureaucratic delays for project developers.
targets.activities: Stakeholder consultations; policy gap analysis; draft amendments

targets.description: Develop a standardised feed-in tariff framework aligned with regional benchmarks to attract private investment.
targets.activities: Economic modelling; stakeholder workshops; policy drafting

outputs.title: Technical and Capacity Recommendations

targets.description: Establish a national renewable energy skills register to track qualified technicians and match them with project needs.
targets.activities: Skills audit; database development; stakeholder engagement

targets.description: Scale up the CREEC training programme to include rural electrification technicians in at least 10 districts by 2026.
targets.activities: Curriculum review; trainer recruitment; district outreach

outputs.title: Financial and Investment Recommendations

targets.description: Establish a blended finance facility specifically for small-scale renewable energy projects below 1MW to de-risk private investment.
targets.activities: Finance structuring; partner engagement; facility design

targets.description: Develop green bond guidelines aligned with international standards to mobilise capital market financing for RE projects.
targets.activities: Market assessment; guidelines drafting; stakeholder validation

outputs.title: Monitoring, Evaluation and Learning Recommendations

targets.description: Institutionalise quarterly implementation review meetings with all 27 lead organisations using data from the digital matrix system.
targets.activities: Meeting framework; ToR drafting; scheduling

targets.description: Publish an annual NREP implementation progress report to be presented to Parliament and shared with development partners.
targets.activities: Report template development; data collection; publication
